QAData.question: Who won between Burkina Faso and Cameroon on Sat, 05 Feb 2022 19:00:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: Cameroon won 3–3 (5–3) over Burkina Faso after penalties on Sat, 05 Feb 2022 19:00:00 GMT.
